evals.name: python-cli-map-and-index
evals.prompt: Use the skill to create a .repo-map/ for evals/files/python-cli. Use default settings.
evals.expected_output: A .repo-map/ directory containing map.md, index.md, preflight_inventory.json, work_plan.json, symbol_seeds.json, and validation.json for the Python CLI sample repository.
expectations: All generated artifacts are under evals/files/python-cli/.repo-map/.
map.md includes pyproject.toml plus src/ with app.py, scripts/ with build.sh, and tests/ with test_app.py.
map.md excludes README.md, docs/usage.md, and dist/generated.js.
index.md includes Runner, Runner.run, main, test_main, and a CLI command from pyproject.toml when detected.

evals.name: node-service-package-metadata
evals.prompt: Use the skill to create a .repo-map/ for evals/files/node-service. Use README and package metadata only as supporting evidence.
evals.expected_output: A .repo-map/ directory that maps executable TypeScript/config files and indexes Node service routes, exported constants, classes, and npm scripts with a passing validation.json.
expectations: map.md includes package.json plus src/ with server.ts and routes/users.ts, and .github/workflows/ with ci.yml.
map.md excludes README.md, docs/api.md, and build/bundle.js.
index.md includes ApiServer, API_VERSION, healthRoute, listUsers, and npm script:build.
Descriptions use README/package metadata only as supporting evidence and keep docs out of the mapped tree.

evals.name: large-repo-auto-partition
evals.prompt: Use the skill to create a .repo-map/ for evals/files/partition-repo with large_repo: true, agent_count: auto, max_agents: 4, target_context_window_tokens: 300, and max_context_usage_ratio: 0.40.
evals.expected_output: A .repo-map/ directory with a work_plan.json that auto-selects multiple whole-file assignments without duplicate owners, plus map.md, index.md, and validation.json built from the assigned files.
expectations: work_plan.json has large_repo true and agent_count no greater than 4.
Each included file appears in exactly one assignment.
No assignment path includes docs, generated output, or .repo-map.
map.md and index.md are produced under .repo-map/ and reflect the executable/config files from the inventory.
